name: stage
description: Install Stage (telescope mount control software) for mount automation and tracking.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${stagePath}='C:\Program Files\Stage\stage.exe'; ${log}=Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\stage-verify.log'; if (Test-Path ${stagePath}) { Set-Content -Path ${log} -Value 'Stage installed successfully'; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\stage-smoke.txt') -Value 'stage_ok' } else { 'Stage executable not found at ' + ${stagePath} | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8 }"
